reference: Hello, you are taking vitamin D3. You can take Tyo K or Uprise D tablets daily, or another option is to have Calcirol sachets once a week for six weeks. Along with vitamin D3, take the Shelcal five hundred milligrams tablet daily.
text: Hello, you are taking Vitamin D3. You can take Tie O K or a 2C tablet daily, or another option is to have Calprool sachets once a week for 6 weeks. Along with Vitamin D3, take the Shellcal 500 mg tablet daily.
